![](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fheaders%2Fservices%2Fagents-pink2.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b)
OUR STRANGE TECHNOLOGY
# AGENTIC OUTCOMES
Our team delivers whatever your problem calls for: an interface, an integration, a complete working system. All powered by a custom agent built for your exact challenge, that continually learns, adapts, and improves your outcomes.
[See the possibilities](https://strangeworks.com/demo)
DEPTH OVER BREADTH
## Built to solve a specific problem: yours.
The intelligence at the core is an always-on agent, custom-built for one optimization challenge. Our team delivers it, wires it into your data and systems, and keeps it learning. It doesn't know the general world. It knows your problem, deeply. Every day it runs, it understands your problem better and solves it faster, cheaper, and smarter.
STRANGEWORKS AURA
## The engine behind every engagement.
From problem definition through production deployment. Aura is how we turn hard optimization challenges into live, running, maintained systems without the months of bespoke handoffs that kill most projects.
  * Structured discovery that quantifies the impact before you commit
  * PhD-level formulation, solver selection, and validation
  * Custom deployment into the environment you already run
  * Ongoing partnership: the model evolves when the business does


[Learn more about Aura](https://strangeworks.com/technology/aura)
[![Aura Identify phase: surface the problem worth solving](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Flanding%2Faura-identify.jpg&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b)](https://strangeworks.com/technology/aura)
HETEROGENEOUS HYBRID COMPUTE
## The compute advantage behind every outcome.
Hard problems rarely have one best solver or one best machine. Our team decomposes your workload, routes each part to the most appropriate method, and runs it across the largest catalog of quantum, quantum-inspired, HPC, and classical compute. The breadth of the catalog is the advantage.
  * Decompose, route, orchestrate: a portfolio approach over single-solver bets
  * One catalog spanning quantum, quantum-inspired, HPC, and classical
  * Solver-agnostic: we pick what's mathematically best, not what we sell
  * Our specialists operate the platform; you get the outcome


[Learn more about HHC](https://strangeworks.com/heterogeneous-hybrid-compute)
[![Heterogeneous Hybrid Compute approach](https://strangeworks.com/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fproducts%2Foptimization%2FHHC-how-desktop.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_AqmT3LgwK35pc36NPqLsd4KUH95b)](https://strangeworks.com/heterogeneous-hybrid-compute)
WHAT THIS MEANS FOR YOU
## Better outcomes, every engagement.
The technology isn't the product. Your outcome is. Here's what that changes when our team works your problem with the tools we built.
### Weeks, not months.
Discovery, formulation, validation, and deployment compress because our team isn't starting from zero. The tooling turns months of bespoke setup into days of configured work.
### Production-grade, not research-ware.
Every engagement ends with a running system, not a notebook or a PDF. Operators get a plain-language dashboard. Integrations fit the environment you already have.
### Best-fit solvers. No agenda.
Our team picks whatever is mathematically best for your problem: classical MIP, quantum-inspired, HPC, or hybrid. No vendor obligation, no solver to defend.
### Decades of OR expertise, encoded.
Problem classification, formulation selection, solver matching, outcome judgment. Built from our specialists and applied to every engagement. Not something you prompt your way into.
![](https://strangeworks.com/images/global/footer-xray.png)
## Solve something hard.
Tell us about the problem. We'll show you what an engagement with our team and our technology can do with it.
[Talk to an Expert](https://strangeworks.com/contact)
[What is Heterogeneous Hybrid Compute?](https://strangeworks.com/heterogeneous-hybrid-compute)

html:
OUR STRANGE TECHNOLOGY

AGENTIC OUTCOMES

Our team delivers whatever your problem calls for: an interface, an integration, a complete working system. All powered by a custom agent built for your exact challenge, that continually learns, adapts, and improves your outcomes.

See the possibilities

DEPTH OVER BREADTH

Built to solve a specific problem: yours.

The intelligence at the core is an always-on agent, custom-built for one optimization challenge. Our team delivers it, wires it into your data and systems, and keeps it learning. It doesn't know the general world. It knows your problem, deeply. Every day it runs, it understands your problem better and solves it faster, cheaper, and smarter.

STRANGEWORKS AURA

The engine behind every engagement.

From problem definition through production deployment. Aura is how we turn hard optimization challenges into live, running, maintained systems without the months of bespoke handoffs that kill most projects.

  • Structured discovery that quantifies the impact before you commit
  • PhD-level formulation, solver selection, and validation
  • Custom deployment into the environment you already run
  • Ongoing partnership: the model evolves when the business does
Learn more about Aura

HETEROGENEOUS HYBRID COMPUTE

The compute advantage behind every outcome.

Hard problems rarely have one best solver or one best machine. Our team decomposes your workload, routes each part to the most appropriate method, and runs it across the largest catalog of quantum, quantum-inspired, HPC, and classical compute. The breadth of the catalog is the advantage.

  • Decompose, route, orchestrate: a portfolio approach over single-solver bets
  • One catalog spanning quantum, quantum-inspired, HPC, and classical
  • Solver-agnostic: we pick what's mathematically best, not what we sell
  • Our specialists operate the platform; you get the outcome
Learn more about HHC

WHAT THIS MEANS FOR YOU

Better outcomes, every engagement.

The technology isn't the product. Your outcome is. Here's what that changes when our team works your problem with the tools we built.

Weeks, not months.

Discovery, formulation, validation, and deployment compress because our team isn't starting from zero. The tooling turns months of bespoke setup into days of configured work.

Production-grade, not research-ware.

Every engagement ends with a running system, not a notebook or a PDF. Operators get a plain-language dashboard. Integrations fit the environment you already have.

Best-fit solvers. No agenda.

Our team picks whatever is mathematically best for your problem: classical MIP, quantum-inspired, HPC, or hybrid. No vendor obligation, no solver to defend.

Decades of OR expertise, encoded.

Problem classification, formulation selection, solver matching, outcome judgment. Built from our specialists and applied to every engagement. Not something you prompt your way into.

Solve something hard.

Tell us about the problem. We'll show you what an engagement with our team and our technology can do with it.

Talk to an Expert
